overview.short: Manohargad-Mansantoshgad Fort (Marathi: मनोहरगड -मनसंतोषगड) are two adjacent forts located on the same hill but separated by a saddle.
overview.description: Manohargad-Mansantoshgad Fort (Marathi: मनोहरगड -मनसंतोषगड) are two adjacent forts located on the same hill but separated by a saddle. This fort is situated at Shivapur, Tal - Kudal. The forts are 33 km from Sawantwadi and the same distance from Kudal Sindhudurg district of Maharashtra. The forts are situated on the hill north of the base village Shivapur.The fort is located in the proximity of the Amboli hill station.

topPlaces.name: Talamba Dam
topPlaces.description: Talamba Dam, is an earthfill dam on Karli river near Kudal, Sindhudurg district in the state of Maharashtra in India.

topPlaces.name: Kalambist
topPlaces.description: Kalmbist is a village in the Sindhudurg district of the Konkan division of the Indian state of Maharashtra.

topPlaces.name: Patgaon
topPlaces.description: Patgaon is a village in Bhudargad Taluka of Kolhapur District, Maharashtra state in western India.The latitude 16.1253483"N and longitude 73.9459679"E are the geographical co-ordinates of Patgaon.

items.note: Talamba Dam, is an earthfill dam on Karli river near Kudal, Sindhudurg district in the state of Maharashtra in India.
Kalmbist is a village in the Sindhudurg district of the Konkan division of the Indian state of Maharashtra.
Patgaon is a village in Bhudargad Taluka of Kolhapur District, Maharashtra state in western India.The latitude 16.1253483"N and longitude 73.9459679"E are the geographical co-ordinates of Patgaon.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mansantoshgad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mansantoshgad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Manohar International Airport, Mopa (North Goa) (37 km) and the nearest railway station is Vasco da Gama (Goa) (74 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mansantoshgad?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mansantoshgad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mansantoshgad?
faq.a: Stays in Mansantoshgad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mansantoshgad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Talamba Dam, Kalambist, Patgaon.
